## Checklist

- [ ] Spell-checked the content
- [ ] Verified all internal links resolve correctly
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete (`title`, `description` on all pages; `lastTested` + `mapVersion` on map pages)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally with no errors
- [ ] All template comments (`<!-- ... -->`) have been removed from the final content
